title: rubus gerhardtii
intro: Rubus gerhardtii, also known as the South American raspberry or Gerhardt's raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Andean region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of anthocyanins, which have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rubus gerhardtii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against cell damage. Rubus gerhardtii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used to make jams and preserves.
